patch.value: No direct command to inspect the local queue, trigger a flush, or see per-command frequency from local JSONL; today only pm health surfaces telemetry state.

pm telemetry status (queue depth/last flush/endpoint), flush (inline flushTelemetryQueueNow), stats [--limit N] (group local events by command, offline), clear (disable+delete queue); advisory; pm_run action=telemetry; empty-queue exits 0.
No direct command to inspect the local queue, trigger a flush, or see per-command frequency from local JSONL; today only pm health surfaces telemetry state.
